## ENGINEERING_RULES compliance checklist

- [ ] I reviewed `ENGINEERING_RULES.md` before implementing.
- [ ] Non-trivial logic was developed with TDD (RED/GREEN/REFACTOR).
- [ ] Architecture boundaries are respected (BE/FE layering).
- [ ] No unnecessary new libraries were introduced.
- [ ] Lint/format/tests pass locally.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the spec are covered.
- [ ] Docs were updated when behavior changed.
